message:
perf(wasm): Reduce initial memory from 2GB to 64MB for faster test262

The 2GB initial memory was causing each test262 test to allocate 2GB
upfront, even though most tests only need a few MB. This caused:
- Memory pressure with thousands of concurrent test processes
- OutOfMemory errors in QuickJS (8932 failures vs 1163 on native)
- Slow execution (72 min vs 68 sec on native QuickJS)

WASM memory grows dynamically via memory.grow, so starting small (64MB)
and growing as needed is more efficient. Large bundles like Claude Code
will still work - they just trigger automatic memory growth.

wasm-static (Claude CLI) keeps 512MB initial since it needs large memory.
